welcome.message: Welcome to MEEK, {name}! We're glad to have you here. Check out the pinned messages for community guidelines and useful links. Feel free to introduce yourself!

engagement.gm: GM MEEK fam! Rise and grind. What are you working on today?
engagement.afternoon_prompt: What are you building today? Share your $MEEK stack with the community!
engagement.gn: GN MEEK fam! Rest up and come back stronger tomorrow. $MEEK never sleeps!
engagement.milestone_100: We just hit {count} members! Thank you all for being part of the MEEK community!
engagement.milestone_500: 500 members strong! MEEK keeps growing. LFG!
engagement.milestone_1000: 1000 members! The MEEK community is unstoppable!
engagement.weekly_recap: Another great week for MEEK! Stay active, stay engaged, and keep building together.
